ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nutrition_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program's goals and methods */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Program start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Program end date */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Demographic details of the target population */,
  "geographical_scope" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the program */,
  "implementing_agency" TEXT /* Name of the agency implementing the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome related to nutrition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health outcome (e.g., mortality, morbidity, nutritional status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "program_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-outcome link */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health outcome */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the program on the outcome (e.g., None, x, improved) */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Quantitative measure of the program's effect on the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES health_outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric measures */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation metric applied */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the specific evaluation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the evaluation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, program manager, public health official) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program */,
  "administrative_level" TEXT /* Administrative level of the location (e.g., district, province, country) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the funding was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program */,
  "partner_organization" TEXT /* Name of the partner organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the partner organization (e.g., implementing, funding, technical assistance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the publication was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES nutrition_programs ("program_id")
)
